info.english_meaning: to speak to tell to explain

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'asyedu prabrUhi pra pUrvyARi karmARi' (f॰1.61.13) prabrUhi=AKyAhi vistareRa SaMsetyarTaH
'kadA nu te BrAtraM prabravAma' (f॰4.23.6) GozayAmetyAha
'prEtAni takmane brUmaH' (aTarva॰5.22.8) prabrUmaH=rahasyanirBedapUrvaM brUmaH
'idaM vAva tajjyezWAya putrAya pitA brahma prabrUyAt' (CAM॰u॰3.11.5) SizyAd upadiSedityarTaH
'yadacarastanvA vAvfDAno balAnIndra prabruvARo janezu' (f॰10.54.2) prabruvARaH=praKyApayan
'huta upasfzwAM prabrUtAdityAha' (kA॰SrO॰4.2.18) praSabdo'narTakaH hate'gnihotre upasfzwA=vatsena saNgatA gOH
'etasyEva baliharaRasyAnte kAmaM prabruvIta Bavati hEvAsya' (go॰gf॰1.4.28) prabruvIta=SabdataH kaTayeta na tu manasA prArTayeta praSabdaH prakarze

prayoga.literature_text: yadAha vacanaM sarvaM SfRu tvaM munipuNgava
kimAha sItA vEdehI brUhi sOmya punaH
nAyakA mama sEnyasya saMjYArTaM tAnbravImi te
sa ca tAM kAlayogena provAca raGunandana
tamuvAca tato brahmA na tAvat ttvaM jitendriyaH
rAGavO ca mahAtmAnO tadA vAkyamuvAca ha
uvAca rAvaRaH sItAM BujaNga iva niHSvasan
vyavasAyaM ca taM budDvA sa hovAca
evaM tu vadatAM tezAmaNgadaH pratyuvAca ha
kiM mAM vakzyati sugrIvo harayo vA
anftaM noktapUrvaM me na ca vakzye
kroDaM gamizyAmi na ca vakzye kaTaYcana
vatsa rAma DanuH paSya iti rAGavamabravIt
sa tvAM dASaraTI rAmo devi kOSalamabravIt
brUyASca me nATaM SUraM rAmaM punaH
avocadyadi tattaTyaM BaveyaM SaraRaM hi vaH
